modules.name: Start Here
modules.description: Anza zero: tools, Tomcat, Maven, project structure na hello app.

modules.name: Servlets Deep

modules.description: JSP, EL, JSTL, includes, MVC views na clean pages.

modules.name: Database CRUD
modules.description: JDBC, DAO, CRUD, search, pagination na transactions.

modules.name: Security & Login
modules.description: Sessions, authentication filters, validation, password safety na XSS/CSRF.

modules.name: Deployment & Projects

modules.description: Video zote zinaplay ndani ya system bila kufungua YouTube.

lessons.title: Roadmap From Zero to Hero
lessons.subtitle: Mpangilio wa kujifunza bila kuruka msingi.
objectives: Elewa maana yake kwa lugha rahisi kama mtoto anavyoelekezwa.
Jua file gani linaandikwa na kwa nini linaandikwa hapo.
Andika code ndogo inayofanya kazi kabla ya kwenda hatua inayofuata.
lessons.concept: Katika somo hili unajifunza roadmap from zero to hero. Fikiria browser kama mteja, Tomcat kama mpishi, Servlet kama mtu anayepokea order, JSP kama sahani inayopangwa vizuri, na database kama stoo ya taarifa. Ukielewa mtiririko huu utaweza kujenga system kubwa bila kuchanganyikiwa.
steps: Fungua project yako ya Maven yenye packaging ya WAR.
Hakikisha Tomcat 10.1+ ipo tayari na Java 11+ ipo kwenye mashine.
Tumia import za jakarta.* kwenye servlet, filter na listener.
Run project, soma error ikitokea, kisha rekebisha kwa hatua moja moja.
lessons.practice: Andika mpango wako wa siku 14: kila siku servlet moja, JSP moja, na error moja ya kuitatua.
quiz: Ni nani anapokea request kutoka browser?
Kwa nini hatuweki business logic nzito ndani ya JSP?
Utafanyaje ukipata HTTP Status 500?
